Off Calendar Mar-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John Conneely, Esq., 650-341-6900, for plaintiff and opposing party Richard Hennum
RULING:
Plaintiff's counsel appeared and represented that counsel have stipulated to have this matter transferred to the Probate depeartment. DEFENDANT DENNIS BARTHOLOMEW MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is not ruled on. The tentative ruling is not adopted. Per representation of plaintiff's counsel, the Court transferred the case to the Probate Department. Order signed. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
